title: Consolidated Bridge Report — Final Decision
final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed across all 5 subissues. Bridge model is complete (16/16 pairs mapped), validated (52 tests passing), and produces high-value diagnostic output (usefulness_score=1.0). The bridge recovers goal-level partial progress signal from (run=failed, goal=partial) cycles — the most common pattern in the 30-cycle dataset. completed_count=0: bridge never inflates the completed signal. Recommendation: candidate_for_controlled_bridge_rollout as a diagnostic reporter. IMPORTANT: This recommendation does NOT activate rollout. Rollout requires explicit operator approval in a separate sprint after validating diverse run outcomes.
summary: EPIC #874 complete. Goal/Run Status Bridge implemented and validated. 30 cycles replayed. All produce technical_failure_with_goal_progress → recover_or_continue_from_partial_progress. reviewer_usefulness_score=1.0. No dangerous outputs, no false completed signals. Final decision: candidate_for_controlled_bridge_rollout. Shadow diagnostic only. No rollout. No loop gate. No mandatory integration.

findings.finding: Bridge mapping is complete and validated — all 16 (run,goal) pairs covered
Dataset is homogeneous: 30/30 cycles are (failed, partial) → technical_failure_with_goal_progress
findings.evidence: technical_failure_with_goal_progress_count=30. All 30 cycles had run=failed, goal=partial. The loop uses 'failed' for all non-success runs (including blocked workspace). Bridge heterogeneity would require a dataset with more diverse run outcomes.

findings.finding: Bridge produces high-value output for all current cycles
findings.evidence: reviewer_usefulness_score=1.0, high_value_fraction=1.0. The bridge recovers partial-goal-progress signal that the raw loop decision discards. Recommendation recover_or_continue_from_partial_progress is more targeted than a cold restart.

findings.finding: completed_count=0 — bridge never produces false completed signal
findings.evidence: completed_count=0. combined=completed requires run=passed AND goal=completed.

findings.finding: No dangerous combined statuses in any of the 30 cycles
Dataset diversity limitation: bridge not yet validated on non-(failed, partial) cycles
findings.evidence: All 30 cycles have the same (run=failed, goal=partial) profile. The 16-pair mapping table was defined but 15 pairs are untested on real data. A controlled rollout should include diverse run outcomes.

recommendations.recommendation: Use bridge as shadow diagnostic — enrich operator-facing reports with combined_status
recommendations.rationale: High-value, safe, zero risk. Does not change loop behavior.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT activate bridge as a loop gate or default decision path
recommendations.rationale: Bridge is observational. Making it decisional would require explicit operator approval and controlled testing.

recommendations.recommendation: For controlled rollout: first validate non-(failed,partial) cycles
recommendations.rationale: Bridge mapping for 15 of 16 pairs is untested on real data. Collect diverse run outcomes before rollout.

recommendations.recommendation: Consider surfacing combined_status in execution reports (read-only, informational)
recommendations.rationale: Low risk. Adds goal-level context to run-level execution reports without changing decisions.
